interface.longDescription: Where capital meets culture, we power the chain and strengthen the tribe. Our staking infrastructure blends security, scalability and efficiency. Built for sustainable high-yield growth with proven reliability and performance tailored for DeFi.
defaultPrompt: List the EAPES tools available in this app.
